definition_population.content: PV is a chronic MPN with clonal RBC overproduction, driven >95% by JAK2 V617F, elevated thrombotic risk, typically presenting in adults over 60.

epidemiology.content: Swedish registry cohort of 2,604 PV patients over 43,612 patient-years. SEER data show 2005-2008 JAK2/WHO diagnostic changes shifted subtype incidence (21% decrease in PV incidence coincident with new criteria).

sources.quote: In this nationwide, population-based study, we analyzed 2604 PV and 3141 ET patients using multiple Swedish health care registers, covering 43,612 patient-years
The 2005 JAK2 V617F discovery and the 2008 WHO diagnostic guideline for the JAK2 V617F mutation coincide with a 31% increase in ET and a 21% decrease in PV incidence rates

biology.content: THAP5 has no direct PubMed literature link to polycythemia — not established in this pass. Dominant PV mechanism is JAK2 V617F-driven constitutive JAK-STAT signaling, a myeloid/megakaryocyte progenitor pathway, not a validated CD4+ T-cell-intrinsic mechanism.

sources.quote: a shared codon 617 substitution of JAK2...leads to a constitutively active tyrosine kinase and a pathogenic lesion that unites all three polycythemia vera, essential thrombocythemia, and primary myelofibrosis
interferes with the autoinhibitory regulation and results in persistent downstream JAK-STAT signaling

treatment.content: Ruxolitinib (JAKAFI), oral JAK1/2 inhibitor, FDA-approved (NDA202192, original approval 2011-11-16) for hydroxyurea-refractory PV; phlebotomy and hydroxyurea remain first-line per real-world German claims data.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP drug-regulatory record: application_number=NDA202192, sponsor=INCYTE CORP)
sources.quote: NDA202192, sponsor INCYTE CORP, original approval action 2011-11-16
thrombotic outcomes and treatment patterns...phlebotomy frequency, and the development of hydroxyurea (HU) intolerance or resistance

regulatory_trials.content: ClinicalTrials.gov lists 306 total interventional trials registered under 'polycythemia vera'.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP clinical-trials search_trials result, condition="polycythemia vera", total=306)
sources.quote: total=306 (search_trials API, condition='polycythemia vera', study_type=INTERVENTIONAL, count_total=True)

gaps: THAP5-PV mechanistic link not established in this pass; OT score (0.34) not corroborated by PubMed literature.
Disease label 'polycythemia' interpreted as polycythemia vera (the clinically dominant, JAK2-driven form) — secondary/relative polycythemia not separately researched.
